titleStmt.title: SII 6.1098: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1098. (A.R. No. 343-F of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē vēdabāhutriśaśiparimitē bhānuvārē daśamyāmā
ṣāḍē śuklapakṣē harigiripatayē śrīnṛsiṁhyāya nityaṁ .
prādādakaṁḍaṁ pratikritisahitaṁ cāmarē mā(ṁ)likāṁ ca svēṣṭā
ptyai śaṁkarēśassakaḷaguṇanidhiḥ śrījagannāthasūnuḥ . śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1324 gunēṁṭi Āṣāḍha śukla daśiminni bhānuvāramunāḍu kaḷiṁgamā
ji jagannātajīyana koḍuku kaḷiṁgaparīkṣa śrīśāṁkarajīyana tanaku Abhiṣṭā
¨rttasiddhigānu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuniki nityamunnu Ubhayadhupalanu parimāṟa
nu veṁjamaralu 2 māpa(ṁ)ṭi dhūpaAvasarānanu cātanu tirutōmāla Okaṭi
nni sama¨rppiṁpi Iṁdulaku śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdu padmanidhi veṁḍiṭaṁkalu 10 sa
ma¨rppiṁpi reṁḍu kuṁcalu prasadamu vṛtigaṁ goni sānulayaṁdu sirāmare
ḍi [A]marāsāniki kuṁca saṁpradāyamaṁdu pulusuraḍi sāniki kuṁcanu pe
ṭenu . tirutōmāla tecci peṭenu bhumi Annamaku prasādāmu kuṁca kaiyi
du māḍalu Iccenu . perumaḷa sannidhini nityamunu veluṁganu Akhaṁḍa
dīpamu pratimasahitaṁgānu sama¨rppiṁpenu samaruku nūṟu mākalanu cī
ḍadamalābōyinivasānanu peṭe Itaṁḍu nelaku Ēḍu dumaṁ guṁcchaṁḍu teci
bhaṁḍārānanu peṭaṁgalāṁḍu dupakāla Avasaramaṁdu māṇikalātōṭi varisanu dha¨rmmupaṭa
madu Anyema kolupu 1 jītamu maṇikalātōṭi samasya vīru I prasadamu bhuji
ṁci I kolupulu Ācaṁdra¨rkkastaIganu koluvaṁgalāru I dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1098 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
